5 
 
                                                 MINISTRY OF EDUCATION 
KUSAKILILA   
Iwu Mukanda Wakulombola Ntañishi hamwakutañishila atudizi amu Fomu 1 
wunasonekewi kuhitila mukuhumañana-humañana nakuhanjeka nanowu 
ezhima akwatahu makasa hansañu zhamashikola. Kwadiñi kuhumañana 
nawantu, mazanvu ninyitayi yamboka kulonda kutambula yitoñozhoka yawu 
hantanjikilu yantañilu yamu Lunda Fomu 1 nakuyinka nawa mpinji yakushimuna 
yitoñozhoka yawu hela munafwili kumonawu muniwu mukanda. Hakachi kawu 
hadiñi; Antañishi amumashikola awatudizi anyanya nakulaku dehi, Antañishi 
kufuma ku mashikola Ansukula na Muñoñi, Mazanvu emenañaku yuma 
yamboka yatañishewaña mumashikola, Nyitayi yadimena yabula kukundama 
kunfulumendi nizanvu damatuña akwashaña ituña da Zambia. 
Mukukunkulula, nalemeshi nyidimu nikudihana kwawa nkoñi kuchibalu cha 
Curriculum Development Centre, azatili nañovu nakumona chikupu neyi 
mudimu wezhima wakundama kukusoneka kwaniwu Mukanda Wakulombola 
Ntañishi wunazatewi nakushika kunsa. 
 
Charles Ndakala (Dr.) 
Director- Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

6 
 
 
 
KULUMBULULA  
Iwu Mukanda Wakulombola Ntañishi amu Fomu 1 wunaloñeshewi 
nukusonekewa nakashinshi kakeni kulonda kuyikwasha kutañisha zhindizilu 
zhamwidimi da Lunda muniyi nloñeshelu yinahimpewi. Iwu mukanda 
anawusoneki kwesekezha nantanjikilu yamu 2023, yazhakutañisha atudizi Idimi 
da Lunda yetezhewa, yemena hakumona neyi atudizi anelukishi kwila yuma 
yinakukuhwelelewawu kuzata. 
Mukanda weniwu wunafwili kukehesha kukala kwafuma hakubula kwanyikanda 
yakuzatisha yetezhewa nakukwasha nawa antañishi nayuma yayeni 
yakuzatisha, zhakwila nizha kweseka nachi atudizi zhaloñeshewa kweseka 
nachipimu chawu muntañilu niyuma yinatweshi kukeñekawu. 
Wunu 
mutayi 
wanfulumendi, 
weluka 
kukala 
kwenzaña 
hakuhimpika 
nakutachika nloñeshelu yantañilu yayiha yinemeni hakumona neyi atudizi 
anelukishi yuma yinakukuhwelelewa mudi wena. Kutonda nloñeshelu ya 
Competence Based Curriculum (CBC) diku kutachika kwachintapu chakuya 
kumbidi mukulubulwisha kushikilamu nakulema kwantañilu.

7 
 
 
 
 
MWATELA KUWUZATISHILA IWU MUKANDA. 
Muniwu mukanda mudi yuma yezhima yatela kutañishewa mu Temu 3 yamu 
Fomu 1. Mukanda weniwu wunambulewi munyitu yansañu dichi nawa mutu 
himutu wansañu wudi nayuma yakutañisha muyibalu yamboka, yidi neyi 
Kuhosha Nakutiyilila, Kutaña, Mazu Akutaña, Kutaña Nakanañachima, Mwaya 
Idimi, Kubalumuna Nsañu ni Kusoneka. Iyi yuma yakutañisha yinasonekewi 
muniwu mukanda hizhindizilu zhinaloñeshewuku ilaña yatela kuzatishewa 
kulonda kuloñesha nikusoneka nachi mwakutañishila zhindizilu.  
NZHILA YAKUTAÑISHILAMU YINAFUUKULEWI 
Mpinji himpinji yiwunakutañisha, watela kuzatisha nukulondela zhinzhila 
zhakutañishilamu atudizi zhamboka-mboka. Dichi, wunatweshi kuzatisha 
zhinzhila zhimu hakachi kanizhi: 
 Kuhema yisela (Role-play). 
 Kuzata nyidimu yamboka-mboka kuhitila mukuhema yisela (kuhema-
hema yisela yamboka/ drama). 
 Kusanda-sanda nakuwana wunsahu walala hanyitu yansañu yamboka-
mboka (Research). 
 Kutaña kuhitila mukukeña-keña kulonda kuwana wunsahu walala hanyitu 
yansañu yamboka-mboka (Discovery). 
 Kutaña kuhitila mukuhanjeka (Discussion). 
 Kusoneka nsañu zhazhila (Short Stories). 
 Kutuña zhinsañu, tuyisela nizhakutañisha zhikwawu kuzatisha kompiyuta. 
Kubombelahu, kwekala nawa nitutufuta tukwawu twakutañishilamu twatela 
kuzatishayi ntañishi hakwila yatweshi kutañisha atudizi amboka-mboka 
awanikaña mukilasi yatañishañayi. Antañishi eluka tuyisela-sela twatuvulu 
kwesekezha nanochu chayitañishawu mukudiza kwawu kumashikola ansukula 
(College).

MUTU WANSAÑU 1: YUMA YALEMA YAKWATA ITUÑA. 
Kulumbulula 
Zhidi muniwu mutu wansañu 
Iwu mutu wansañu wunakuya nakutala hayuma yinateli kukwasha antu kuzata 
nikushakama chachiwahi mwiluña. Yuma yidi neyi; kuzata nañovu, kwovwahila 
anlomboli, kudinuña nakuzatila hamu, kwikala na walala, kudikeña muntu 
namukwawu, kukiña ituña niyuma yikwawu. 
Muniyi nsañu mudi yibalu yansañu yitanu. Mudi chibalu chakuhosha nakutiyilila. 
Munichi chibalu mudi mutu wa nsañu wakuhanjeka ni mutu wansañu wanyanya 
wakuhanjeka nakutiyashana. Ichi chibalu chikukwashaku atudizi kuditiyilila 
wumu namukwawu, kudiza kushakama hamu nakumanisha nsañu mukachi 
kawu chakadi yikonkozhola, chikukwashaku nawa kuleta kunuñañana mukachi 
kawu. 
Muchibalu Chakutaña mudi nyitu yansañu yisatu: Kutaña Mazu, Kutaña 
Kwakunama ni Kutañila Hewulu. Mudi nawa nyitu yansañu yanyanyai; 
Mwalumbulukila mazu, Kutaña nakanañachima ni Kutaña kwakuwahi. Kutaña 
mazu nimwalumbulukilawu chikukwasha atudizi kuzatisha mazu munyikuku 
yamazu. Mutu wansañu wakutaña kwakunama wukukwasha atudizi kutaña 
nsañu yahachipimu chawu nakuyitiyishisha nikwakula malwihu anayinkuwu. 
Mutu wansañu wakutañila hewulu wukukwashaku atudizi kutaña nsañu 
chachiwahi chakubula kuhudekela, kukulukila kuwana nsañu munyikanda 
lufuchi-lufuchi ni kutaña kwakufumisha chiwudi. Muchibalu chakusoneka mudi 
mutu wakusoneka chituñi chakutontolola hela kulumbulula. Ichi chibalu 
chikukwashaku atudizi kwikala nakashinshi kakushinshika chekala ochu chuma 
chakubula kuchimwena kukabadi kamu hohu.

16 
 
Muchibalu chamwaya idimi mudi mutu wansañu wakutuña mazu. Mudi nawa 
mutu wansañu wanyanya wa ntachikilu, kahakachi ni insa yamazu. Ichi chibalu 
chikukwashaku atudizi kwiluka kunuña nsona nakutuña izu nikunuña mazu na 
kutuña mukuku wamazu. 
Muchibalu chakubalumuna nsañu mudi mutu wansañu wanyanya wanzhila 
zhakubalumwinamu nsañu. Ichi chibalu chikukwasha atudizi kwiluka zhinzhila 
zhamboka zhakubalumwinamu nsañu. 
Kukoka yitoñozhoka ya watudizi 
Ihulaku atudizi alumbululi chiyelañawu munyikala neyi antu anadivulumuni hela 
anaboboli muntu wumu namukwawu. 
CHIBALU: KUHOSHA NAKUTIYILILA 
Mutu wansañu: Kuhanjeka. 
Mutu wansañu wanyanya: Kuhanjeka nakutiyashana. 
Chuma chinakukuhwelelewi atudizi kwilukisha: Kuzatisha mazu amawahi 
hakuhanjeka hansañu yinakwati hachihandilu chawantu (Yuma yinateli 
kukwasha antu kuzata nikushakama chiwahi mwiluña dawu). 
Zhakwila 
 Kuhanjeka hamutu wudi wezhima hayuma yinakwati kuchihandilu chawantu 
(Yuma yinateli kukwasha antu kuzata nikushakama chiwahi mwiluña dawu) 
mumazanvu. Yuma yidi neyi; kukeña, kavumbi, kuzatila hamu, kwikala na 
walala, kuzata nañovu niyuma yikwawu. 
Ntañishi 
 Ambulaku atudizi mumazanvu. 
 Alezhi atudizi ahanjiki hayuma yinatweshi kukwasha antu kuzata 
nikushakama chiwahi mwiluña dawu.

Governance in Pre-Colonial Zambia 
Governance is as old as humanity. All societies on earth had at least one form of 
governance or another. Societies such as the Ngonis, Bembas, Tumbukas, Lozis 
and Lundas were ruled by Kings.  Rulers had absolute power over people. The 
people under their rule were answerable to them. The king or queen was at the 
apex of the government hierarchy. Below him or her came chiefs. The village 
headmen or headwomen came right at the bottom, overseeing the villages. 
The family was headed by a father.

 Alumbulwili atudizi nshimbi mwakusokela zhinahoshiyi muntu. 
 
Nshimbi zhakusoneka mazu anahoshiyi muntu 
(a) Shaku mazu anahoshewi mukachi katonenu twahewulu (“”) chidi 
neyi; Wahosha nindi, “Lelu kunatati nankashi.” 
(b) Sonekaku nsona yeyi yatachi nansona yeneni chidi neyi; Wehula 
nindi,” Yowanu wudi kudihi?” 
(c) Shaku mazu anahoshi muntu mutonenu twahewulu. chidi neyi; 
Wahosha nindi, “Basi yinalabi kwinza na budidi yinu.” Hela Ntañishi 
wabidika nindi,” Lekenu kuhosha!” 
(d) Shaku konenu (,) hanyima yakuhosha chidi neyi; Wahosha nindi, 
ntañishi wabidika, Ichi chidi ñana muloña konenu kanenzi henohu 
tonenu twahewulu henohu kanda muloña himazu anahoshewiku. 
(e) Neyi mazu anahoshewi anakumi nakanokelu(.), ilaña kuhosha 
kanda chidi neyi wahosha nindi, Zatishaku konenu bayi kanokeluku, 
henohu kanda wushi tonenu twahewuluku kufumahu dinu wushi 
konenu kukumana kwamukuku wamazu.  
(f) Neyi mazu anahoshewi anamanini mukwihula (?), hela na   
kahayamisha (!), bayi kuhimpa iyi nketwiluku hela tuhu mazu 
anahoshewi adi nawu, wahosha nindi “Mukanda weyi wunafumi 
kudihi?” Wehula. “Nazhimbeshi nkoloku yami!”  Wabidikili.

Chayileñayi wadibulakeni na Kavuyi adikumayi nindi hamukala iku nasendi 
isaka   danyikamba hamutu. Wamwihwili nindi,” Wudi nakufumina kudihi?” Yena    
nindi, “Inakufumina kumaha,” Kambanda nindi,” Komana nineyi wadima iha 
dandimbu?” Kavuyi wamweneni nzo-o muloña hadiñi neha hela dimuku.  
Kuhalwa komana weyili nyikamba yambala mwiha da Kambanda. Chashikiliyi     
mwiha kuwana anembumu nyikamba anuka nichamuwaniniyi Kavuyi nasendi 
isaka danyikamba. Kambanda nindi, “Ayina nyikamba yasendayi Kavuyi    
hidiyu yembayi mwiha damiku?” Kavuyi wembili nyikamba nakufunta   
kumukala. Chashikiliyi walezheli antu amakwawu hamukala zhamwekeni.  
Amutambikili Kavuyi nakumusompesha. Yena nawa hadikaliluku wetezheli nindi 
wembilili muloña wanzala. Walombeli kwanakena nakuhosha nindi, “Hamba 
kufuntilamu cheñuku.”

Mutu wansañu wanyanya: Nzhila zhakuzatisha hakubalumuna nsañu. 
Henohu atudizi kanda azati mudimu, yilumbulwili mwakubalumwina nyikuku 
yamazu kufuma mu Chizungu nakutwala mu Lunda, hela kufuma mu Lunda 
nakutwala mu Chizungu. Zatishaku Chitalilu chidi mumukanda wakadizi hela 
cheyi. 
Chitalilu: 
Trees are very important to both man and animals. Without trees, we cannot live 
well. We make charcoal from frees. Trees attracts rainfall which makes it

necessary for the growth of crops. We get caterpillars from trees. Timber comes 
from trees too. The president of Zambia said that there is need to plant trees 
every year to replace our lost trees. Cultivation, timber production and clearing 
land for new towns is one way we lose trees. This has made animals and insects 
lose their homes. Therefore, we need to protect our trees.
